response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Conservative policy requires minimum 0.55 SoC threshold before sharing; cluster stress and declining peer SoC necessitate self-preservation priority—escalate own urgent requests instead.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r1c3. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.40 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.55, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Cluster-wide energy stress detected; r1c2 SoC declining despite inbound acceptances. Prioritize self-preservation while maintaining minimal geographic reciprocity. Escalate own requests to urgent to secure inbound supply before SoC falls below 0.40..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
